title: AI Model Gateway Launch
situation: Our enterprise customers were experiencing significant latency when accessing multiple AI models via different APIs.
task: Simplify the developer experience and reduce latency through a unified gateway.
action: I defined the requirements for a central proxy layer that cached common requests and normalized response formats. I collaborated with the infra team to deploy this on Kubernetes.
result: Latency decreased by 40% on average, and developer adoption grew by 200% within the first quarter.

title: Legacy Identity Migration
situation: Our legacy identity system was fragmented and didn't support modern SSO requirements, causing friction for enterprise sales.
task: Migrate all users to a new OIDC-compliant system without downtime.
action: I led the cross-functional effort across security, frontend, and backend teams. We used a dual-write approach to ensure data consistency during the transition.
result: Successfully migrated 1M+ users with zero downtime. This unblocked 3 major enterprise deals worth $5M.

title: DevOps Tooling NPS Turnaround
situation: Our CLI tool was powerful but difficult to use, leading to an NPS of 15.
task: Improve the developer experience (DX) and increase user satisfaction.
action: I conducted 50+ deep-dive interviews with users. Based on feedback, I prioritized a complete overhaul of the CLI documentation and introduced an interactive setup wizard.
result: NPS increased from 15 to 45 within six months, and GitHub stars for the project doubled.
